clauses.original_text: the Merger Agreement may be terminated (a) by the mutual written consent of both the Company and JHX
clauses.processed_text: the Merger Agreement may be terminated (a) by the mutual written consent of both the Company and JHX

clauses.original_text: by either the Company or JHX if the consummation of the Merger does not occur on or before March 23, 2026, subject to an automatic extension for a period of three months under certain circumstances
clauses.processed_text: by either the Company or JHX if the consummation of the Merger does not occur on or before March 23, 2026, subject to an automatic extension for a period of three months under certain circumstances

clauses.original_text: by either the Company or JHX if there exists a final and nonappealable law or order prohibiting the Merger
clauses.processed_text: by either the Company or JHX if there exists a final and nonappealable law or order prohibiting the Merger

clauses.original_text: by either the Company or JHX upon a failure to receive the Company Stockholder Approval (after a stockholder meeting is held for such purpose)
clauses.processed_text: by either the Company or JHX upon a failure to receive the Company Stockholder Approval (after a stockholder meeting is held for such purpose)

clauses.original_text: by either the Company or JHX in the event of a material uncured breach by the other party of its representations, warranties, covenants or other agreements under the Merger Agreement
clauses.processed_text: by either the Company or JHX in the event of a material uncured breach by the other party of its representations, warranties, covenants or other agreements under the Merger Agreement

clauses.original_text: by the Company in order to accept a Superior Proposal (as defined in the Merger Agreement)
clauses.processed_text: by the Company in order to accept a Superior Proposal (as defined in the Merger Agreement)

clauses.original_text: by JHX in the event the Company Board of Directors makes an adverse recommendation change
